botToken.title: Bot token
botToken.description: Get your bot token from the Discord Developer Portal under your application's Bot settings.

guildId.title: Guild (server) ID
guildId.description: The Discord server ID. Enable Developer Mode in Discord settings, then right-click the server to copy its ID.

generalChannelId.title: General channel ID
generalChannelId.description: The default channel for cross-space queries and unrouted suggestions. Right-click a channel to copy its ID.

spaceChannelMappings.title: Space-channel mappings
spaceChannelMappings.description: JSON mapping of smart home space IDs to Discord channel IDs. Messages in a mapped channel include that space's context.

allowedRoleId.title: Allowed role ID
allowedRoleId.description: Discord role ID required to interact with the bot. Leave empty to allow all server members.

config.edited: Discord bot settings have been updated
config.notEdited: Failed to update Discord bot settings

texts.aboutDiscordSettings: Configure your Discord bot integration. Create a bot at the Discord Developer Portal, enable the Message Content Intent, and add it to your server. Map Discord channels to smart home spaces for context-aware conversations.
